[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1000001001 3
1 0000000001 1
2 0100000000 1
3 0100000010 2
4 1110101010 6
5 1011001001 5
6 1010110101 6
7 0101000010 3

01 10 0100000000 1 match 2
12 21 1010000001 3
23 32 0000000000 a
34 43 0100000000 1 match 2
45 54 0110100010 4
56 65 1010001000 3
67 76 1010000001 3
70 07 0000000000 a

02 20 0000000010 1
13 31 0100000000 1 match 2
24 42 0010100010 3
35 53 0100000000 1 match 2
46 64 0010000000 1
57 75 1010100000 3
60 06 0001000000 1
71 17 1010010001 4

03 30 0101000000 2
14 41 0110010000 3
25 52 1010100010 4
36 63 0001000000 1
47 74 0010110000 3
50 05 0100000010 2 match 3
61 16 1010001001 4
72 27 1010100001 4

04 40 0100000010 2 match 3
15 51 1110001000 4
26 62 1010000001 3
37 73 0000000000 a
